title: Sprout Sprint (Design Concept)
description: Concept: prove a multi-day streak using nullifiers to prevent double-claiming. Not yet implemented.

designInputs.dayHashes: SHA-256 hash of each day's activity (private)
designInputs.streakNullifier: Unique nullifier per streak to prevent double-claims

verification: Not yet implemented. Requires a nullifier circuit that enforces consecutive day ordering.
note: Design concept only. This file documents the intended proof format for future implementation.
